features.name: Pack Tactics
features.description: The wolf has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) Piercing damage. If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it has the Prone condition.

actions.name: Cold Breath (Recharge 5–6)
actions.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, each creature in a 15-foot Cone. Failure: 18 (4d8) Cold damage. Success: Half damage.

weaknesses: Dependent on pack for maximum effectiveness
tactical_info.tactics: Works with pack to surround enemies. Uses cold breath to soften groups, then charges for bite attacks to knock prone. Excellent mobility for flanking.
